entry.title: Re: DOMAIN using UNIT data type
entry.content: Why don't you reuse the domain MEINS, or even the eponymous data element MEINS?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Consumption Model not visible in SAC
entry.content: Found it, you must have at least one perspective that is published. Switching from MS stock to SAP isn't always easy 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David, 

I am a 46 year old woman who is switching careers. I have obtained a Master of Science in AI, however, a degree alone is not enough without knowing how to use my knowledge in different clouds. SAP seems to be in demand and my chosen path is Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud.  Starting the learning today! Thankful in advance,

Dana

entry.title: BW Query create cumulative value
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly please check below 2 scenario's and help to create the BW Query in BW4HANA.

Scenario 1:

We have the values like below

GL Account Costcenter fiscal year period value1 value2 value3 value4 etc.

  123456      2345          001.2024             100     200     300       400

                                       002.2024

                                        003.2024 etc

 

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 value1 should be show =100

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 to 002. 2024 value should be shown like 300 (Value 100 +200)

if we select the fiscalyear period 001,2024 to 003.2024 value should be shown like  600 (Value 100+200+300) like 12 periods.

Scenario 2:

if we select the period 001.2024 value should be 100

if we select the period 002.2004 value should be 200

if we select the period 003.2024 value should be 300 show like 12 periods

Please check and help me to create the new BW Query.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
The solution is: 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVE_EINA_EINE'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Union EINA and EINE CDS View'
define view entity ZC_EinaEineUnion as select from eina
{
  key eina.infnr,
  'EINA' as TableSource,
  eina.matnr
}
union all
select from eine as e
  inner join eina as i on i.infnr = e.infnr
{
  key e.infnr,
  'EINE' as TableSource,
  i.matnr
}

 

Many thanks to GPT-4o 😉

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: What if we already have event broker technology that is non sap? Can s4 private cloud standard events use non SAP brokers as well or do we first need to use EMIS or advanced event mesh to make s4 events consumable?

entry.title: Re: How to archive EBAN data with specific criteria
entry.content:
Hello,

You want to clean up old purchase order data.

There's a way to automatically delete old purchase orders that don't have a number.

You might need to write some special computer code to do this. Or, you can use the tools that are already in your system.

Let's figure out the best way to do it.

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: SAP EHS SVT: Display Confirmed quantity per order in...
entry.content:
Hello

sorry. nobody can guide you if you have not a  clear requirement (clear cutomer demand... tht data should show up to display etc.)

We are using this BADi; but i am not allowed to share details regarding technical implementation.

You need to discuss with the "end user" and7or expert of SVT process .. what does he/she expect to see in CBRC20 for "Confirmed" data and based on that you might be able to define a "high level design" to be used for this BADi

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Question for SVT Tracking Programs Using 'Initial' op...
entry.content:
Hello

regarding:

The major issue I see is RREGCH_VT program related. Assume some more products are included in future in SVT program(these will not be a new developed products but existing products only). All this newly added products will have logistic data like Purchase orders / Goods receipts / Production orders etc created through out the year. Can we track the logistic data for those products from beginning of the year even though they are included in SVT program in the middle of the year? Because the CCRCT_RUN table time stamp will be current date in that case how can it track the backdated logistic data from beginning?

YOu have may be the wrong understanding how SVT works.

1.) Data can change at any point in time within the year (e.g. "composition is changing" etc.)

2.) New material can be sold, produced purchased this year never seen last year

any many other combinations.

Step 1 is always ro make sure: you have e.g. a "composition" (there is data in CCRCT_EHS_COMP for the effected material)

Step 2: then tracking will run.. (delta mode)

Step 3. If e.g. the user determines.. upps. now it is ime for "RetrackinG" ("reanalyse" all data since 01.01 of a year): SAP has delevered for this a special report to do so.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/substance-volume-tracking-using-sap-ehs-management/ba-p/13272665 might help

BUt you will find many threads regarding "SVT" (how to use it properly etc.)

Wish you the best

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add custom field in CVD1 Tcode to s...
entry.content:
Hello

sorry to say.. I am not aware of an option to "do this". Only by doing a "modificatioN" it might work.

BUT. You: please check with technical guy. May be by using "Enhancement Points" you can do the trick.

But what do you would like to achieve? What is your requirement?

PS: what you can do without "modification" is to add further "Search options". This is not a modification and you just use "SAP Standard" (you prepare a new user exit to do so).

C.B.

entry.title: Re: MyInbox tasks count error
entry.content: Fixed by applying this note.

entry.title: SAC Script: empty/undefined input parameter of filterValues.type break the storry to an error
entry.content:
Hi,

Problem:
-in a SAC script I want to grasp the value(s) of the Input Parameters of a BW query,
-some input parameters are not set, "undefined", "NULL",
-any command on filterValues.type  like "switch(filterValues.type){]" breaks the storry to an error,
- in this sample where  the first empty variable is ZMO_VAR_REGIO01:

Design:
-query MANAGREP with 10 + Input Parameters
-SAC Story with table MANAGREP
-onResultChanged Event
-the code like bellow, the error raising section boxed in with //+++++++

Possible solution:
-identify empty filterValuetypes and sort them out
-How ?

Any advice is wellcome  :)!

ThanXs.
=====================================================================
Here is the full code, boxed in, //+++++++++++, the errornous section:
=====================================================================

// Get alle the variables form the Query
// MANAGREP is the Table / Query
var filterName = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariables();
console.log("++filterName:");
console.log( filterName);
 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// LOOP over all Input Parameter
for ( var j=0; j < filterName.length; j++){
   console.log("++filterName[j].id:");
   console.log( filterName[j].id);
 
   var filterValues = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariableValues(filterName[j].id)[0];
   console.log("++filterValues:");
   console.log(filterValues);
 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Differentiate type of Input Parameter ( in ABABP: LT_RANGE) to treat values accordingly
    console.log("++filterValues.type:");
 
//+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
// Any operation on filterValues.type breaks with this error, if the parameter is empty, what means not set in the
// query:
// "
// Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type') 
// TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type')
// at Proxy.eval (MANAGREP.onResultChanged.js:12:34)
//
// ----> How to handle an undefined input parameter ? <----------
//++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 
    console.log(filterValues.type);
switch(filterValues.type){
 
case VariableValueType.Single:
         console.log("++VariableValueType.Single:");
         console.log(VariableValueType.Single);
 
// Get  a single value from the input parameter
     var singlefilterValue = cast(Type.SingleVariableValue, filterValues );
         console.log(" singlefilterValuefilterValues:");
         console.log( singlefilterValue.value);
//       Add some logic on the single values of the single inut parameter here:
         break;
 
   case VariableValueType.Multiple:
        console.log("++VariableValueType.Multiple:");
        console.log(VariableValueType.Multiple);
 
    var multiFilterValues = cast(Type.MultipleVariableValue,  filterValues);
        console.log("multiFilterValues filterValues:");
        console.log( multiFilterValues.values);
//---------------------------------------------------
// Loop over the values of the multiple value input parameter
    for ( var i = 0; i < multiFilterValues.values.length; i++){
      console.log("multiFilterValues.values[i]  filterValues:");
    console.log( multiFilterValues.values[i]);
//          Add some logic on the multiple values of the parameterhere:
    }
//---------------------------------------------------
// Loop END over the values of the parameter
     break;
case VariableValueType.Range:
     console.log("++VariableValueType.Range:");
         console.log(VariableValueType.Range);
//       Get the value of the ranges, how  ?
//       Add some logic on the range values of the range input parameter here:
         break;
 
   default:
console.log("++DEFAULT");
        break; 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Differentiate type of Input Parameter ( in ABABP: LT_RANGE)
}
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// LOOP over Input Parameter
}
console.log("FINISHED");

entry.content:
Hello Team,

Current Landscape S4hana 1909 - Windows, HANA2.0 - Linux (distributed environment) both PRD and TST.

SAP S4HANA1909 DEV, TST and PRD configured with Solution manager for CHARM TR process.

We are planning to perform DB refresh from PRD to TST. Is there any specific pre-steps/tasks to be perform related Charm?. We have to make sure Charm process should be impacted after DB refresh activity.

Can you please check and advise.

entry.title: Re: SWPM SAPHANADB cannot be set during Primary Applicati...
entry.content: Found an issue with the preceding schema database load, SAPHANADB should have existed in the database.  Since it didn't, authentication failed. Upon successful load of S4Core Exports in to the Tenant database the issue was resolved.

entry.title: How to enable parallel processing - Cube to DSO load
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some flow in SAP BW 7.5 on HANA system : Cube to DSO load. ( We need to persist data into DSO for some business requirement so that that flat table can be used for Look ups, HANA CV's in further levels)

All of the field mappings are one to one in BW TRFN, So I have used the "HANA Execution" option.

But, currently that dtp load is happening at one go as a data Insertion as its "hana execution"  & I don't have any control to enable the parallel extraction as its Greyed out in DTP screen.

So, how can we enable Parallel extraction/ Insertion incase of HANA Execution/AMDP ?  because currently its inserting all data at once using that - SAP HANA Execution option & occupying 400GB of memory. We want that Inserts happening in parallel.

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: What is the difference between Release Upgrade and Version in SAP ?
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

Recently we had a request for performing EHP Upgrade 

Source -> EHP4 and NW 7.0

Target -> EHP8 and NW 7.5

During the upgrade we got ASUTOOL Box Phase where it is primarily asked when Release Upgrade is being in process right ?

Wanted to know whether Above Upgrade comes under "Release Upgrade" or "Version Upgrade".

Thanks,
Mithran

Prabhat

You can try with the restrict selection option, key figure Value with  GL Account Costcenter fiscal year period(create customer exist variable) and in calculation tab enable it cumulated  = ON

entry.title: Posted the stock using MIGO, move type 561, showing in MD04 , MMBE but not in CO09
entry.content:
Hi All

I posted the stock using MIGO with move type 561. The entry is showing in MB51, 

MMBE showing the stock

MD04: showing the stock

 

but in CO09, showing blank

in sales order for 30 qty,  while clicking on ATP, it is showing nothing ( 0 qty)

in MMBE, MD04 but NOT  in Co09. and unable to confirm the schedule lines. what could be the reason why system is not showing in ATP(CO09). 

Other information: in Material master the safety stock is NOT maintained anything. and we are using S4 hana 2023 system

Thanks!

entry.title: Filtering Workflows based on Payrun A or Payrun B
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are using SF EC and have two groups of employees for whom we run fortnightly payruns ie payrun A (01 July to 14 July) & B (08 July to 21 July). Can we filter workflows for payrun A employees (need to focus on coming due payrun) and also filter workflow for payrun B employees. 

Will highly appreciate help. 
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Here's my submission:

 That Key-as-Segment URL Syntax is interesting, and it can be combined with the parentheses-style in the same URL.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Picking by 2 workers
entry.content:
Hi,

You have three options to achieve this:

  1. 2-Step Picking
  2. Pick-Pack-Pass Process in EWM
  3. Apply LOSC (if it’s the usual or standard process in warehouse)

For more detailed information, you can refer to SAP Blogs covering each topic.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
There's languages and there's languages. Compilers can enforce strict grammars. Street lingo, on the other hand, evolves organically rather than by version releases. 

https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/kudo

I primarily bemoan that forte has 2 syllables now.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: My Task4 Submission

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE: Shift basic finish date to next workday not possible
entry.content: Not possible. See/debug FORM CHECK_PLAF_TERMINE (LM61OF8Q). You would need to check and adjust the date in your own coding before calling the BAPI.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA Cloud (Cloud ERP)
entry.content: 老师，请问外币评估的凭证为啥多出来两行金额为0的，利润中心和细分都是一样的

entry.title: Re: What is difference between Installation Export and Upgrade Export in SWDC
entry.content: Dear Guru's,

entry.title: Re: What is difference between Installation Export and Up...
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

Installation Export will be used only for NEW System Installation which we term as "Vanilla Installation".

We need to use "Installation Export" for the same.

In case of "Upgrade Export"  --> this will be used during Upgrades like EHP 4 to  EHP8.

adding further EHP8 is different from all other EHP upgrades like for example -->

EHP4 to EHP5/EHP6 and EHP7 --> IN this case Shadow system will build a clone.

Where as in EHP8 Shadow system will build from DVD and not a clone kind of setup.

Thanks and Regards,
Mithran

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Amazing even this kind of circular references work with ease 

/odata/v4/northbreeze/Suppliers(1)?$expand=Products($expand=Category,Supplier($expand=Products($expand=Supplier)))

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Catching up this fantastic task during the weekend, here's my submission - 

My CQL statement to determine the number of products (count) was working fine when tested locally (localhost:4004), but was failing after deploying to CF. It took me quite some time to figure out that the issue was the "count" function needs an alias to work in CF i.e.; 'count(ProductID) as count'.  Strangely the "count" without alias works fine locally. 

Finally, got it working with 

New learning!! 🙂

entry.title: Hello World!
entry.content: Hello SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: SAC Script has got no IF (... OR ...) ?
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

not sure if I understand your question when you say "others"? So, if you want to use if then else with "OR" condition:

if (condition1 || condition2 || condition3) then {

//this code will be executed if any of the previous conditions are true

}

else {

//this code will be applied for the "others" conditions

} 

 

Am I answering your question?

 

Regards,

Javier

entry.title: disaster recovery server
entry.content:
we are using sap s4 hana 2021 with hana databse with 110 gb ..

what are the perquisites to create a replication server which we can use/Switch  in Emergency situations?

Physical server config should be Same ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: disaster recovery server
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For configuration steps of HANA availability, please see the SAP HANA System Replication Guide:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4e9b18c116aa42fc84c7dbfd02111aba/afac7100bc6d47729ae8eae32da5fdec.html

The secondary should be sized the same as primary, but their may be scope to use the resources on secondary as described in 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4e9b18c116aa42fc84c7dbfd02111aba/9d62b8108063497f9d6aab08902b2e04.html

Also see
1999880 - FAQ: SAP HANA System Replication
2057595 - FAQ: SAP HANA High Availability

entry.title: Re: Failed to compile web version
Re: Delivery already contained in shipment, deletion of t...
entry.content:
Hello Chris,

Yes. This is standard behavior to avoid deletion of planned deliveries.

To delete delivery, delete line item(s) and save the delivery. This ideally will cancel your FO (if exists). In case you have FU, use Cancel strategy in FU to cancel FO once FU is cancelled. Then you cvan delete the delivery in Change mode.

Hope this works.

 

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to Event-Based Revenue Recognition with Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Meghanath,

for service orders there is fixed price bundling in place. here mutiple service order items are bundled and there is only one billing item. in this case there is only one CO-Object: all costs and revenues of the bundle are aggregated on one co-object/service order item, on which EBRR runs. you can get more information here blog financial accounting for service management 

stefan

This experience would be very beneficial to me as I continue on my educational path towards achieving career growth. Looking forward to receiving a redemption code for the SAP certification attempt(C_TS422)

Regards,
Indrajit Lalit.

entry.title: SAP S4/HANA Advance Return (ARM) with Follow-up Activity 0026 - Repairs In-house Order Failing
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to create an in-house repair order as follow-up activity after receiving the item as a return order using ARM. I managed to create the return and receive it, however, at the point of creating the in-house repair order its failing.

 

Based on the log the error is:

 

I have updated these items as well

1. At the material master level the serial number profile is added

2. The same serial number profile has the ADVR procedure is assigned to this procedure as well

 

If there is any information you can share that would really help.

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: stock value incosistency
entry.content: What is the solution to correct point # 1

entry.title: Integrating SAP BTP Cockpit with SSO
entry.content:
We have the desire to integrate our SAML Identity Provider to the login of SAP BTP Cockpit.

We wanted to know if this is possible, because we couldn't find any configuration related to the login parameters of SAP BTP Cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP BTP Cockpit with SSO
entry.content:
For platform access to the cockpit, a Platform IdP needs to be configured at Global Account level. For that, you need an Identity Authentication tenant, which you can use as a proxy to your custom Identity Provider:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/establish-trust-and-federation-of-custom-identity-providers-for-platform-users

SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I'm excited to express my interest in participating in the Digital Skills Initiative. With a background in web development and currently enhancing my skills in various programming languages such as C, C++, Java, and Python, I believe I can significantly benefit from this program.

I'm particularly keen on learning SAP, as I've heard it's immensely useful for securing high-paying job opportunities and making the job search process easier. SAP's comprehensive suite of tools and solutions aligns well with my goal to expand my technical expertise and open doors to more advanced and lucrative roles in the tech industry.

Thank you for considering my application. Looking forward to the opportunity to grow and learn with you all!

Best regards,
@kavinkumarv

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows 2.1 Compati...
entry.content:
I am unsure if the Windows version is in parity with iOS and Android, so you may face issues using 2405 metadata.

Secondly, it seems like you are scanning a destination of 2305 so you should use the same metadata version.

entry.title: Re: How to create Abstract CDS view in format of DDIC deep structure?
entry.content: What is this condition 1=0 in the association of _reusetext ?

entry.title: In favor of improvements for the builder
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to leave my feedback about the platform.

I am facing problems when exporting to the web version. I made a previous post on the subject, but received no response. I'm frustrated, as I previously used https://forums.appgyver.com/, where things were easier and more productive. There were lots of tutorials and the forum was very engaging. However, with the recent changes, the situation has worsened regarding the forum.

I would like to share a little of my journey and suggest improvements to "SAP Builder".

Honestly, with three years of experience using the platform, I realize that it is not possible to advance much. Here are some reasons why it's not feasible to create a medium to large complex app or website.

Firstly, I was forced to learn programming in Python to be able to create APIs and integrate them with "SAP Builder". I hoped to create a successful startup using Python APIs and JavaScript snippets. However, my dream was frustrated, as the builder keeps crashing when I try to create a startup using only APIs, caching and JavaScript. This occurs in both the web and mobile versions, when I export to (.apk, .html, .css, .javascript).

The platform doesn't support many elements on one page, even if I simplify it across multiple pages. Either way, the system crashes and slows down. I've done several tests, even on supercomputers, and the project still shows slowness and crashes.

For example, if I create an API to list 300 rows of data in "SAP Builder", it crashes even though it is a single page application. Carrying out the same procedure on other platforms such as Bubble.io or WordPress, everything works perfectly. I'm most familiar with "SAP Builder", which has great potential but lacks focus on performance improvements. It would be possible to create large-scale web and .apk applications if it weren't for this slowness.

I would be willing to pay for "SAP Builder" if there was support for improvements to the builder. I'm frustrated because I don't have time to learn programming right now. I am experiencing health problems and my focus is to create a startup using my knowledge of Python and JavaScript. I analyzed that it is possible to create large projects in a short term (1 week), while pure code (HTML, CSS and JavaScript) could take months. However, the previously reported slowness impedes this progress.

I'm lost, as everything was supposed to work, but my three-year experience with "SAP Builder" leads me to conclude that it's not possible to move forward with the platform in its current state. Other companies are focused on AI and technological advancements, as well as improvements and new features. "SAP Builder" is falling behind because it does not support essential web features such as sliders, videos with a native player, animations between functional pages, modern design elements for the mobile version, and the ability to handle large volumes of data of API without crashing in the .apk version.

To improve, it is crucial that "SAP Builder" implements robust support for these features. The platform needs to be able to manage large amounts of API data without compromising performance, both in the web and .apk versions. Additionally, it is important to include features such as sliders and smooth animations between pages for a better user experience. Support for large-scale CSS and JavaScript is also essential, as is ensuring animation elements work correctly. Without these improvements, the platform will not be able to compete with others that already offer these capabilities and continue to advance technologically. I, and many other users, would be willing to pay for "SAP Builder" if there was a clear commitment to continuous improvement and adequate support.

Therefore, I ask that other users also speak out in favor of these improvements. It is essential that the platform offers more resources, even if they are paid, to ensure better performance and functionality.

I would like to pay for the platform, but I hope the main issues are resolved. I finished a virtual banking project, which performs automatic bank transfers and automatic deposits using Python APIs on my own server. I did all the tests and used encryption in the APIs, but the project was stopped due to the limitations of "SAP Builder". The platform does not support many features, which causes slowness, even when reducing logic. Although it is possible to use, there are errors when exporting to the web version (HTML, CSS, JavaScript), which in the case of "SAP Builder" is React Native.

Thank you for your attention and I hope you consider these improvements to make the platform more efficient and robust.

entry.title: SAP Dispute Management in FSCM - Can't see model yafd_udm_dispute_cdis in q system, why?
entry.content:
Hello together,

we've completed the configuration for dispute management. After the transportation to the Q system (test system), we can't see our implemented model yafd_udm_dispute_cdis in the Q system. But we see the other models in the Q system.

Is it right, when i transport my new model with this method?

Also we acivated the node/subtree.

IMPORTANT before your read the obove text > NOT: We created at first the model with the name yafd_udm_dispute and finished the configuration. After diverse tests, we can't create dispute cases. After that we delete the model yafd_udm_dispute and delete the following objects:

After we've created a new model yafd_udm_dispute_cdis. With this new model, we can create new dispute cases, al was OK! Configuration was completed. After the releases the transports, we can't see the new model in the q system (test system), although we appoved the new model in the development system.

Is the problem, what i guess, that we delete the old model yafd_udm_dispute with the three objects? For this reason, we can't see the new model yafd_udm_dispute_cdis in the q system? after the transportation?

Thank you very much for your help.

Best regards,

L. Eren

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
Indeed, see https://me.sap.com/notes/3485708

Source Editor (CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT)

  • 3450882 - Editor: Java SAPGUI ABAP Edit Control support

In case of experiencing dumps when navigating to screens using CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT like in ABAP Workbench, this note is required.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Howdy. 

My name is Nicholas and I am a former nuclear power plant operator in the US Navy. I was responsible for the gage calibration program, maintaining the repair parts inventory, and for doing all kinds of preventative and corrective maintenance. Now that I am out, I find that there is very little cross-over between my military experience and the private sector, and that most tools/programs seems to be mutually exclusive between the fields. As such, I would like to enroll in this program in order to upskill myself to be an application engineer for these systems, either as a script developer or as a maintenance program implementer. 

I have already started the manufacturing learning path, and I would be interested in getting as many certifications as possible while the program is still running. Thank you for your consideration.

Respectfully, 
Nicholas

entry.title: Re: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conver...
entry.content:
Hi Norm,

 

Your attached images didn't come through, but I'll try to answer your questions:

In general for in place conversion the sequence would be Convert Dev -> Fix or replace unconverted objects in Dev -> Convert QA -> Import post conversion fixes from Dev -> Convert Prod -> import post conversion transports.  I would NOT assume process chains would be converted and "ready to run". 

Hope this provides some clarity,

John Hawk

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
@mengxin  How did you receive it? I've signed up for the beta but have not received any mail regarding downloading it.

Edit: please ignore, I've received the email.

entry.title: Re: SAPAPPL1 taking very long time to import
entry.content: 2170582 - Data export is "hung" on table RSTT_CALLSTACK in package SAPAPPL1 during system copy

entry.title: SAP BW question
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would install an BW system.
we are evaluating if to install a SAP BW/4HANA system or a BW on PERSON_NAME system but we have a doubt:

It's possible to install HANA DB Instance on RHEL Linux OS and Application server Instance on Oracle Solaris 11.3 SPARC OS?

thanks and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW question
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please see the product availability matrix at:
https://support.sap.com/en/release-upgrade-maintenance.html

you can check the supported OS for application servers for any SAP product.

1067221 - Composite SAP Note for heterogeneous installation

can you please advice / check?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Create purchase requisition from Sales Order without
entry.content: Public cloud does not have TAS as standard.

entry.title: Re: Create purchase requisition from Sales Order without
entry.content: We are looking for similar solution. But standard configuration in S4 public cloud does not have TAS item category. are there any alternatives?

entry.title: Re: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content: HI Sishir, Even I am facing the same issue, I am Unable to select the Query using the EDMX file.It may be a product bug

entry.title: Re: CPI: use Query parameters in external API call
entry.content:
1. Allow the headers in the runtime configuration. Using a asterick to permit for all sometimes causes issues.
So maintain the name as it is like in the screenshot. The "|" comes in between.

 

 2. Now go to the content modifier>Message Header tab and create the names and values for both params.



3. Now go to the content modifier>Exchange Property tab and create the names, choose header for source type and for source value pick the corresponding value in the dropdown.

 4. Go to the target system tab and in both query params pass ${property.params} as values
and for the request headers pass the same names you allowed in the headers in the runtime configuration.
Save and deploy service @anhuhn

entry.title: Re: SAP AEM requirement and guidance
entry.content: HI Ramu,If Partner needs only one field ,May be we can use AEM-->CI(format the data based on requirement) -->partner APi call So we no need to ask him for Modification r

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation – Learning Content May 2023
entry.content: great
